history.content:
<thought>
The goal G is directly three cells to the right and three cells up from my current position. The cell in front of me contains lava, so I cannot move forward. Turning right would place me facing to the right, where there is an empty floor cell. This is a safe move towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is located two cells to the left and one cell up from my current position. The cell in front of me is a lava cell, so I cannot move forward. Turning left will allow me to move towards the goal. There is an empty floor cell to my left, which is a safe move.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>
